stemHtml: If during flight a considerable amount of fuel was transferred from a fuel tank located in the forward fuselage section to a fuel tank located at the rear section of the fuselage, what effect would this have on the aircraft?

options.a: Increase in range and stall speed.
options.b: Increase in stability and trim drag.
options.c: Increase in range and decrease in stall speed.
options.d: Increase in stability and decrease in trim drag.
